overall_assessment: Clean for the performance lane. Within the bounded package, sent-status hydration is occurrence-scoped, authenticated-inviter-scoped, backed by a compound lookup index, avoids global post-auth scans, dedupes same-key in-flight refreshes, merges filtered refreshes without cache loss, and limits accepted-push refresh work to the affected occurrence. No concrete server/runtime load amplification, unbounded scan, page-walking, N+1, or high-cardinality in-memory filtering risk is evident from the dispatch package.
recommended_path: Proceed with the round as performance-clean. Keep the already recorded real-device and full CI-equivalent checks as promotion evidence gates rather than local performance blockers.
